prompt:
9:16竖屏，15秒，写实生活风格，暖黄室内光， 手机支架视角略微仰拍，画面中一个二十多岁的女生【图片1】坐在出租屋的小桌前， 素颜只涂了口红，头发随意扎成丸子头，穿着一件洗得发白的灰色oversized卫衣， 面前摆着一份刚拆开的麻辣烫外卖，热气腾腾，红油汤底， 旁边散落着手机、纸巾和一罐打开的可乐， 背景是普通出租屋客厅，墙上贴着一个小小的福字， 窗户外隐约能看到对面楼的万家灯火， 女生一边用筷子夹起一块藕片吹了吹塞进嘴里，一边对着镜头含糊地说话， 嘴角沾了点红油，随手用手背擦了一下，又夹起一根粉丝呲溜吸进去， 说到什么地方突然笑了，筷子指着镜头，嘴里还嚼着东西，眼睛弯成月牙， 然后又低头继续扒拉麻辣烫，表情自然松弛。 
台词（女生，轻松随意语气，讲潮汕话）："今年过年无等内，一个人在深圳……诶，这个麻辣烫还真不赖！阿姆打电话来问我几时嫁，我讲我嫁给麻辣烫了啦哈哈哈。" 音效：筷子碰塑料碗的声音、吸粉丝的呲溜声、窗外隐约的鞭炮声、手机偶尔的消息提示音。 
禁止：任何文字、字幕、LOGO或水印

prompt: 第1段： 15秒中国古装短剧风格，电影感画面质感，暖金与冷青色调交替，2.35:1宽银幕构图压缩至9:16竖屏。 画面（0-3秒）：现代都市夜景，一个穿着白色连衣裙的年轻漂亮女生站在天桥上低头看手机，突然脚下踩空， 体向后仰倒坠落，镜头俯拍她坠落的慢动作，长发飘散瞳孔放大，周围的霓虹灯光拉成流光线条形成时空隧道漩 涡特效，画面急速旋转 画面（4-8秒）：女生猛地睁开双眼发现自己躺在一张华贵的红木雕花大床上，穿着一身精美的秦式深衣曲裾， 红色锦缎绣金丝云纹，头戴金步摇珠翠发饰，她惊慌地坐起环顾四周，房间是奢华的秦朝贵族内室，帷幔低垂， 青铜灯台烛光摇曳，一个侍女跪在床前惊喜地喊"小姐您终于醒了"，女生懵地看着自己的双手喃喃说"我…穿越了 ？" 画面（9-12秒）：大门被推开，一个管家模样的老者手捧竹简卷轴走入，身后跟着一队仆人抬着数箱金银珠宝和 丝帛，管家跪下说"老爷留下的万贯家财、三十间商铺、良田千亩，如今都归小姐一人所有"，镜头环绕扫过满室 的财宝珠光闪烁，女生从震惊慢慢变为嘴角上扬露出一丝现代人的狡黠微笑 画面（13-15秒）：镜头切至府外大门口，一个身着黑色华服的年轻公子骑马缓缓经过，剑眉星目面容冷峻英俊 马蹄在青石板路上踏出火花，他抬头看到女生站在二楼雕花窗边往外张望，两人目光在空中交汇，公子冷淡地移 开视线策马离去，女生皱眉低声说"这人…好大的架子"，风吹动她的发丝和窗边纱帘 台词1（侍女，惊喜焦急）："小姐您终于醒了！" 台词2（女生，懵然困惑）："我…穿越了？" 台词3（管家，恭敬庄重）："万贯家财如今都归小姐一人所有" 台词4（女生，挑眉不屑）："这人…好大的架子" 音效：开场都市环境音突然切断，坠落时空隧道的嗡鸣回旋声，穿越后切为安静的古风室内环境音，烛火噼啪声 ，财宝展示时的华丽古筝拨弦，公子策马经过时马蹄清脆有力，收尾一声古琴低弦余韵悬停。禁止出现任何文字 、字幕或水印。 衔接点 本段结尾画面：女生站在二楼雕花窗边，风吹动发丝和纱帘，目送黑衣公子策马远去的背影，表情微微皱眉带着 好奇与不屑。 第2段： 将@视频1延长15秒。 画面（0-4秒）：接上段女生望窗画面，场景切至繁华的秦朝集市街道，女生身着华贵曲裾带着两个侍女走在街 ，手中摇着团扇神态从容，路人纷纷侧目行礼低声议论"这便是新继承苏家万贯家财的苏小姐"，女生享受着众人 的注目，昂首挺胸学着古人的姿态走路但偶尔脚步不协调暴露了现代人的习惯，镜头正面中景跟拍 画面（5-9秒）：女生经过一间绸缎庄时与迎面走出的黑衣公子撞了个正着，团扇掉落地上，女生踉跄后退一步 头怒视"你走路不看路吗"，公子低头冷冷看了她一眼嘴角微微一撇说"苏家千金？不过是个暴发户罢了"，女生瞬 间瞪大双眼气得脸颊微红上前一步指着他说"你再说一遍？"，两人近距离对峙怒目相视，镜头推至两人面部特写 ，浅景深背景虚化 画面（10-13秒）：突然一辆失控的牛车从街角冲来，路人惊叫四散，女生被吓到愣在原地，公子眼神瞬间一变 一把拉住女生的手腕将她猛地拽入怀中转身避开牛车，两人贴身相撞跌入路边的丝帛铺摊位中，彩色丝帛从空中 飘落如花瓣雨般洒在两人身上，升格慢动作特写公子低头护住女生时紧皱的眉头和认真的侧脸 画面（14-15秒）：女生在丝帛堆中抬头，发现公子的脸近在咫尺，两人四目相对呼吸可闻，女生瞳孔微颤心跳 速耳根泛红，公子率先回过神面无表情地松开手站起来整理衣袍，冷冷丢下一句"下次走路当心"便转身离去，女 生坐在丝帛堆中怔怔望着他的背影，侍女焦急跑来搀扶，女生摸了摸被握过的手腕，微微咬唇表情复杂。旁白低 沉磁性男声说"预知后事如何，请看下集" 台词1（路人，窃窃私语）："这便是苏家千金…" 台词2（女生，恼怒直接）："你走路不看路吗！" 台词3（公子，冷淡轻蔑）："苏家千金？不过是个暴发户罢了" 台词4（女生，气急反击）："你再说一遍？" 台词5（公子，冷漠关心）："下次走路当心" 台词6（旁白，低沉磁性）："预知后事如何，请看下集" 音效：开场热闹的秦朝集市嘈杂声和路人议论声，撞面时配一声急促的琵琶拨弦，对峙时紧张的鼓点渐密，牛车 冲来时路人尖叫声和牛吼声，拽入怀中瞬间所有环境音静音只剩心跳声，丝帛飘落时空灵的古筝泛音如流水，四 目相对时心跳声加速放大，公子离去后一声悠长的竹笛余韵，收尾旁白后配短剧经典的悬念钩子BGM。禁止出现 何文字、字幕或水印。

Create a 15-second ultra-realistic cinematic influencer vlog video. Use the same consistent character throughout all shots.
Authentic iPhone 14 Pro TikTok vlog realism, handheld camera imperfections, front-camera selfies mixed with back-camera stadium footage, natural motion blur, autofocus breathing, slight rolling-shutter wobble, realistic HDR, and loud crowd audio distortion. 24 fps, 26 mm lens equivalent.
Scene 1 (0–3s) — Stadium Intro
Front-facing selfie outside Emirates Stadiumbefore kickoff. Fans stream behind her.
She says: “Guys, I’m at Arsenal vs Burnley and the atmosphere is absolutely insane!”
Scene 2 (3–6s) — In the Stands
Selfie from her seat with the pitch glowing behind her.
She says: “We’ve got such a good view. Arsenal look really sharp already!”
Scene 3 (6–9s) — Match Action
Back camera shows Arsenal F.C.attacking Burnley F.C..
She shouts: “Come on Arsenal… shoot! SHOOT!”
Scene 4 (9–12s) — Goal Moment
Back camera captures Arsenal scoring.
She screams: “GOAL! Oh my God, I got it!”
Scene 5 (12–15s) — Celebration Selfie
Front-facing selfie as she jumps and laughs with celebrating fans behind her.
She says: “I actually caught the goal on camera! Best moment ever! Come on Arsenal!”

prompt:
​A high-resolution indoor lifestyle portrait photograph of [NAME].
​Captured in a medium-full shot from a slightly low angle, she leans casually and confidently forward against a kitchen counter, her torso projecting slightly toward the camera. Her right arm extends down, gripping the counter's edge for support, while her left hand rests gently on her thigh. She has her hair gracefully swept to one side, looking directly at the camera with expressive, slightly narrowed eyes and a playful, confident, subtle smile. Her skin features a highly realistic, glowing texture with fine pores visible under the light. She is dressed in a plain, white, form-fitting cropped tank top that reveals her midriff, paired with high-waisted black dolphin sports shorts featuring white piping and a white drawstring tied in a bow at the front.
​The setting is a modern, well-lit domestic kitchen with a playful, alluring, and casual vibe. The background showcases light brown wooden lower cabinets with silver handles, a black countertop with integrated stove knobs, a white square-tile backsplash, and upper wooden cabinets. Subtle props like hanging kitchen utensils (a spatula and ladle) and a metal sink faucet blend into the elegantly blurred background. Bright, soft natural daylight streams through a large window on the left, casting a delicate rim light on her hair and the left side of her body, while creating smooth, natural shadow transitions on her right side.
​Shot with a 35mm lens at f/2.8 to maintain sharp focus on her eyes and clothing texture while yielding a beautiful background bokeh on the tiles and kitchen details. The lighting is perfectly balanced, simulating ISO 200 and a 1/250s shutter speed to prevent overexposure from the window, ensuring impeccable white balance and perfectly retained shadow details. Aspect Ratio 9:16.

title: Indoor Cafe Lifestyle Portrait
scenario: a verified Nano Banana image prompt from X for Candid, Hyper-Realistic Indoor Café Scene Featuring a, preserving the original source language, reference intent, style direction, and visible generation instructions

action: Use the original Nano Banana prompt for Candid, Hyper-Realistic Indoor Café Scene Featuring a as an image-generation structure with your own subject, reference image, style, and aspect-ratio constraints.
prompt:
A candid, hyper-realistic indoor café scene featuring a young woman sitting at a dark wooden table, facing forward behind an open silver laptop (Apple MacBook with glowing logo). She has fair skin, soft facial features, and light brown hair tied loosely in a messy bun with a few strands falling naturally around her face. She is wearing a simple oversized dark gray sweatshirt, giving a relaxed and casual look.

Her expression is playful and slightly mischievous, sticking her tongue out subtly while looking directly toward the camera. Her posture is slightly leaned forward, elbows resting near the table, suggesting a relaxed working or studying moment.

The setting is a cozy, dimly lit café corner with warm ambient lighting and smooth brown walls in the background, creating a minimalist and intimate atmosphere. The lighting is soft and diffused, casting gentle shadows and enhancing skin tones naturally.

On the table:

* In the foreground, a white ceramic cup filled with coffee sits on a matching saucer, slightly off-center, closest to the camera, with smooth reflections on the surface.
* To the left, a second laptop (partially visible) is open, showing a colorful interface on the screen.
* Near the center-left, a small rectangular purple card lies flat on the table.
* A white cup and saucer are also visible behind the main laptop, suggesting another drink.
* On the right side, there is a folded dark textured fabric or bag resting near the edge of the table.
* Additional subtle objects like napkins and small items are scattered naturally, enhancing realism.

Composition:

* Shot from a slightly low, eye-level perspective across the table, creating depth.
* Foreground (coffee cup) slightly blurred with shallow depth of field.
* Midground (laptop and subject) in sharp focus.
* Background softly blurred.

Style & quality:

* ultra photorealistic, candid photography style
* natural lighting, warm tones
* shallow depth of field, soft bokeh
* realistic textures (skin, fabric, wood, ceramic)
* high dynamic range, 8K detail
* no over-editing, authentic lifestyle aesthetic

prompt:
Ultra-photorealistic Instagram-style 3x3 morning routine collage post, cozy feminine lifestyle aesthetic, soft neutral tones, clean influencer content style. The same beautiful young woman appears consistently in all nine panels, with long dark voluminous hair, luminous skin, defined brows, soft natural glam makeup, and a warm elegant morning vibe. The overall feeling is fresh, soft, girly, polished, and realistic.

At the top, add an Instagram post interface header with the username “ozgedoner”, a profile photo, a blue verification badge, a Follow button, and the music label “Imagine Dragons · Wake Up”. Add a small “1/4” carousel indicator in the upper-right corner of the grid.

Panel 1: waking up in white bedding, messy soft hair, sleepy relaxed expression
Panel 2: stretching in bed, wearing a soft white or light pajama camisole
Panel 3: brushing teeth in the bathroom mirror, casual pajama top
Panel 4: applying skincare cream to her cheek, soft robe, glowy skin
Panel 5: styling her hair with a curling iron, getting ready
Panel 6: doing makeup at the vanity, applying lip product in front of a mirror
Panel 7: holding a coffee mug, cozy morning light by the window
Panel 8: eating breakfast, holding a bowl with fruit/yogurt/granola and a spoon
Panel 9: finished soft glam morning selfie, styled hair, fresh polished look

Environment: bright cozy bedroom and bathroom, white bedding, beige and cream decor, soft daylight, minimalist clean home atmosphere, subtle luxury lifestyle feel. Keep the woman’s identity, face, hair color, skin tone, and overall style consistent in every panel. Realistic skin texture, candid but polished composition, natural social media content vibe.

Negative prompt:

different face in each panel, inconsistent identity, blurry, low quality, distorted hands, extra fingers, bad anatomy, messy collage, plastic skin, cartoon, illustration, harsh lighting, cluttered background, watermark, text errors, deformed face, duplicated features.

title: F1 Race-Day POV Photo

prompt:
Ultra-realistic iPhone race-day POV photo, identity preserved exactly from reference image.

Young woman walking on the F1 Miami circuit track, photographed from behind and slightly to the side as if the viewer is holding her hand. Her arm reaches back toward the camera and her hand is holding the photographer’s hand in the lower left foreground. She turns her upper body and head back toward camera with a big bright smile, playful “come with me” energy.

Framing:
Vertical iPhone photo, close medium-full body crop from behind. Her body is angled away down the track, but her face is turned back toward camera. The viewer’s hand and forearm are visible in the bottom-left foreground, slightly larger due to perspective. The track curves into the background with a white painted curb line on the right, grass beyond it, and crowds of people walking in the distance.

Outfit:
Red Ferrari-style racing cap with yellow shield badge, long straight dark hair flowing under the cap, black fitted long-sleeve cropped top with subtle cutout on the back/side, black Ferrari-style racing jacket tied around her waist with red horse logo and red racing patches, sporty paddock-girl styling.

Expression:
Huge genuine smile, eyes toward camera, confident, fun, flirty, race-day excitement.

Environment:
F1 Miami race track / paddock walk area, open sky, grandstands and track barriers in the background, scattered race fans and staff walking around, bright daytime sunlight with soft clouds. Real event atmosphere, not empty, not staged.

Camera + lighting:
Raw iPhone rear-camera snapshot, 0.5x slight wide-angle perspective, natural daylight, mild harsh sun highlights, real shadows on pavement, casual travel/race-day photo feel.

Important:
Match the hand-holding POV framing, her turned-back smile, red cap, black outfit, jacket tied around waist, track curve, crowds, and sunny F1 Miami atmosphere closely.

Natural skin texture, no beauty filter, no smoothing, realistic fabric, realistic crowd scale.
